mapper.select: SELECT tm.* FROM team_member tm INNER JOIN team_space ts ON tm.team_id = ts.id WHERE tm.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tm.is_deleted = 0 AND tm.account_id IS NOT NULL AND ts.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ts.is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{_parameter} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY joined_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE account_id = #{_parameter} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY joined_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_member ( team_id, user_id, account_id, role, status, joined_at, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{teamId}, #{userId}, #{accountId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{joinedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), role = VALUES(role), status = VALUES(status), joined_at = VALUES(joined_at), update_time = NOW(), is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE team_member SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_member SET role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_member SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
